body: ## Pull request overview This PR prepares the `v0.3.1` release by bumping the module version and adding the `0.3.1` release notes + compare links to `CHANGELOG.md` (no implementation changes). **Changes:** - Bump `moon.mod` version from `0.3.0` to `0.3.1`. - Add `0.3.1` section to `CHANGELOG.md` with release notes and update bottom compare links. ### Reviewed changes Copilot reviewed 2 out of 2 changed files in this pull request and generated 1 comment. | File | Description | | ---- | ----------- | | moon.mod | Version bump to `0.3.1` for the release. | | CHANGELOG.md | Adds `0.3.1` release notes and updates compare/reference links. | --- 💡 Add Copilot custom instructions for smarter, more guided reviews. Learn how to get started.
